claims.statement: generateSaltBase64 generates a salt using nextBytes.
generateSaltBase64 returns the Base64 encoding of the generated salt by calling toBase64.

entities.name: generateSaltBase64
entities.description: Method that generates a random salt and returns it as Base64.

entities.name: nextBytes
entities.description: Method call used to fill a byte array with random bytes.

entities.name: toBase64
entities.description: Method that encodes bytes to Base64.

relations.description: generateSaltBase64 calls nextBytes to generate random salt bytes.
generateSaltBase64 calls toBase64 to encode the salt.
